name: 攻击
note:
<Use Undertale Attack>

<UTB Duration: 9999>
<UTB Mode: 0>
<UTB Move Limit: 160, 160, 480, 320>
<UTB Player Sprite: heart>
<UTB Player Speed: 5>

<UTB Attack 1>
Image: Ball
Width: 32
Height: 32
Collision Type: circle
Radius: 16
</UTB Attack 1>

<UTB Attack 2>
Image: Cat
Width: 32
Height: 32
Collision Type: circle
Radius: 30
</UTB Attack 2>

<UTB Attack 3>
Image: Cane
Width: 64
Height: 64
Collision Type: rectangle

<Direct Code>
// 让弹幕持续旋转
this.rotation += 0.03;
</Direct Code>

</UTB Attack 3>

<UTB Code>
// --- 每帧获取对象 ---
var player = this._player;

// --- 初始化 (只在第1帧执行) ---
if (f === 1) {
    // 初始化变量
    this._phase = 1;
    this._phaseTimer = 0;

player.bitmap = ImageManager.loadBitmap('img/SumRndmDde/utb/', 'heart');
    
    // 杰克动画初始化
    this._animFrameIndex = 0;
    this._animTickCount = 0;
    this._animDelays = [15, 10, 80, 10, 120];
    this._currentDelay = this._animDelays[0];

    // 隐藏原敌人
    var enemy = $gameTroop.members()[0];
    if (enemy) enemy.hide();

    // 设置位置
    var posX = this.window.x + 50 - 200;
    var posY = (this.window.y + this.window.height) + 70;
    player.visible = true;
    player.x = posX;
    player.y = posY;

    // 创建杰克 Sprite
    this._jackSprite = new Sprite();
    var fullPath = 'img/SumRndmDde/utb/Jack.png';
    this._jackSprite.bitmap = ImageManager.loadNormalBitmap(fullPath, 0);
    this._jackSprite.x = posX;
    this._jackSprite.y = posY;
    this._jackSprite.anchor.x = 0.5;
    this._jackSprite.anchor.y = 1;
    this._jackSprite.width = 511;
    this._jackSprite.height = 511;
    eval('this.addChild(this._jackSprite)');

    // 初始对话
    this.message("别那么瞪着我...也许我的\n代码在你之上？谁知道呢。");
}

// --- 时间限制: 60秒 (强力修复卡死和双击) ---
if (f >= 3600) {
    // 阶段1: 只负责发消息 (只执行一次)
    if (!this._finalMessageSent) {
        this._finalMessageSent = true;
        this._player.visible = false;
        this._finished = true;
        this.message("好无聊...你不会攻击？");
        this.message("'尝试按空格攻击杰克'");
        // 设置标志，准备结束
        this._awaitingGoodbye = true;
    }
    
    // 阶段2: 只负责检测按键
    if (this._awaitingGoodbye && Input.isTriggered('ok')) {
        $gameMessage.clear();
        BattleManager.endBattle(0);
    }
}

// --- 阶段管理器 (基于总帧数) ---
var totalSeconds = Math.floor(f / 60);

// =================================================================
// 阶段 1: 0-20秒 (加速密集雨点)
// =================================================================
if (totalSeconds < 20) {
    if (this._phase !== 1) {
        this._phase = 1;
        this._phaseTimer = 0;
        this._mode = 0; 
        player.y = (this.window.y + this.window.height) + 70;
        this.message("别那么瞪着我...也许我的\n代码在你之上？谁知道呢。");
    }
    
    // --- 动态密集度逻辑 ---
    // 基础间隔: 一开始是 120 帧生成一个，随着时间推移，间隔变短
    // 计算当前应该的间隔帧数
    // 假设第 0 秒间隔为 120 帧，第 20 秒间隔为 30 帧 (越小越密集)
    var baseInterval = 30;
    var minInterval = 15; // 最小间隔，限制太快
    
    // 随着时间推移，currentInterval 会从 120 逐渐降到 30
    var currentInterval = baseInterval - (totalSeconds * ((baseInterval - minInterval) / 20));
    // 限制最小值
    if (currentInterval < minInterval) currentInterval = minInterval;
    
    // 将间隔帧数转换为频率 (取整数)
    // Math.floor(f / currentInterval) 会随时间变化得越来越快
    var frequency = Math.floor(f / currentInterval);
    
    // --- 生成弹幕 ---
    // 使用频率来判断是否生成
    // 这里使用 f % 1 === 0 是为了确保每帧都检查，但通过 frequency 的变化来控制实际生成速度
    // 更简单的方式：直接利用 f 和 currentInterval 取余
    if (f >= 60 && f % Math.floor(currentInterval) === 0) {
        var bullet = this.createAttack(1);
        bullet.x = this.window.x + Math.random() * this.window.width;
        bullet.y = this.window.y - 10;
        // 随着时间推移，雨点下落速度也稍微加快
        bullet.yspeed = 2 + (totalSeconds * 0.2); 
        bullet.xspeed = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5; 
    }
}

// =================================================================
// 阶段 2: 20-40秒 (加速弹球大猫)
// =================================================================
else if (totalSeconds < 40) {
    if (this._phase !== 2) {
        this._phase = 2;
        this._phaseTimer = 0;
        this._mode = 0; 
        this.message("！抓住那只淘气的笨猫");

        // --- 生成一只大猫 ---
        this._bigCat = this.createAttack(2);
        this._bigCat.width = 60;  
        this._bigCat.height = 60;
        this._bigCat.x = this.window.x + (this.window.width / 2);
        this._bigCat.y = this.window.y + (this.window.height / 2);

        // --- 初始化速度 ---
        // 初始速度不要设太大，因为我们后面会加速
        this._bigCat.xspeed = 3; 
        this._bigCat.yspeed = 3;

        // --- 定义边界 ---
        this._leftBound = this.window.x + 30;
        this._rightBound = this.window.x + this.window.width - 30;
        this._topBound = this.window.y + 30;
        this._bottomBound = this.window.y + this.window.height - 30;
    }
    
    this._phaseTimer++;

    // --- 核心移动逻辑 ---
    // 1. 增加加速度 (关键代码)
    // 每一帧都给速度增加一点点 (0.005 是加速度，数值越大加速越快)
    this._bigCat.xspeed *= 1.005; 
    this._bigCat.yspeed *= 1.005; 

    // 2. 移动猫
    this._bigCat.x += this._bigCat.xspeed;
    this._bigCat.y += this._bigCat.yspeed;

    // 3. 边界检测与反弹
    if (this._bigCat.x <= this._leftBound || this._bigCat.x >= this._rightBound) {
        this._bigCat.xspeed = -this._bigCat.xspeed;
    }
    if (this._bigCat.y <= this._topBound || this._bigCat.y >= this._bottomBound) {
        this._bigCat.yspeed = -this._bigCat.yspeed;
    }
}
// =================================================================
// 阶段 3: 40-60秒 (旋转玫瑰手杖)
// =================================================================
else {
    if (this._phase !== 3) {
        this._phase = 3;
        this._phaseTimer = 0;
        this._mode = 0; 
        player.y = this.window.y + this.window.height - 50;
        this.message("等一下...我家就没有别的\n武器？");
    }
    
    this._phaseTimer++;
    
    if (this._phaseTimer % 240 === 0) {
        var left = this.createAttack(3);
        left.x = this.window.x - 50;
        left.y = this.window.y + (this.window.height / 2);
        left.xspeed = 4;
        left.yspeed = 0;
        left._rotateOffset = Math.random() * 10;
        left.xaccel = 0;
        left.yaccel = 0;

        var right = this.createAttack(3);
        right.x = this.window.x + this.window.width + 50;
        right.y = this.window.y + (this.window.height / 2);
        right.xspeed = -4;
        right.yspeed = 0;
        right._rotateOffset = Math.random() * 10;
        right.xaccel = 0;
        right.yaccel = 0;
    }
    
    // --- 修复点：添加循环来更新手杖位置 ---
    var allSprites = this.children;
    for (var i = 0; i < allSprites.length; i++) {
        var sprite = allSprites[i];
        if (sprite._rotateOffset !== undefined) {
            sprite._rotateOffset += 0.02;
            var centerX = this.window.x + (this.window.width / 2);
            var centerY = this.window.y + (this.window.height / 2);
            sprite.x = centerX + Math.sin(sprite._rotateOffset) * 100;
            sprite.y = centerY + Math.cos(sprite._rotateOffset) * 100;
        }
    }
}

// --- 杰克动画更新 ---
if (this._jackSprite && this._jackSprite.bitmap && this._jackSprite.bitmap.isReady()) {
    this._animTickCount++;
    if (this._animTickCount >= this._currentDelay) {
        this._animFrameIndex++;
        if (this._animFrameIndex >= 5) this._animFrameIndex = 0;
        this._animTickCount = 0;
        this._currentDelay = this._animDelays[this._animFrameIndex];
    }
    var sy = this._animFrameIndex * 511;
    this._jackSprite.setFrame(0, sy, 511, 511);
}
</UTB Code>
</Use Undertale Attack>

name: 防御
note: 1 号技能会在选择“防御”指令时使用。

name: 火焰
note:
<Use Undertale Attack>
<UTB Attack 1>
Initial X: this.x + 50
Initial Y: this.y + 50
X Speed: 2
Y Speed: 0
Collision Type: circle
Radius: 20
Spawn Rate: 1
</UTB Attack 1>

name: 爪子
note:
<Use Undertale Attack>

<UTB Duration: 9999>
<UTB Mode: 2>
<UTB Move Limit: 160, 160, 480, 320>
<UTB Player Sprite: heart3>
<UTB Player Speed: 5>

<UTB Attack 1>
Image: Ball
Width: 32
Height: 32
Collision Type: circle
Radius: 16
</UTB Attack 1>

<UTB Attack 2>
Image: Cat
Width: 32
Height: 32
Collision Type: circle
Radius: 30
</UTB Attack 2>

<UTB Attack 3>
Image: Cane
Width: 64
Height: 64
Collision Type: rectangle
<Direct Code>
this.rotation += 0.03;
</Direct Code>
</UTB Attack 3>

<UTB Code>
// --- 每帧获取对象 ---
var player = this._player;

// --- 计算屏幕中心点 ---
// 这些是躲避框的参数，对应上面的 Move Limit
var BOX_LEFT = 160;
var BOX_TOP = 160; 
var BOX_RIGHT = 480;
var BOX_BOTTOM = 320;

// === 关键修改：在这里调整心的“虚拟中心”位置 ===
// 原来的代码是：var CENTER_X = ... / 2;
// 我们在除以2之前，给右边加上偏移量，或者直接在后面加
// 这里设置为：向右偏移30，向下偏移15
var CENTER_X = BOX_LEFT + (BOX_RIGHT - BOX_LEFT) / 2 + 87; // +30 表示往右移30像素
var CENTER_Y = BOX_TOP + (BOX_BOTTOM - BOX_TOP) / 2 + 205;  // +15 表示往下移15像素

// --- 初始化 (只在第1帧执行) ---
if (f === 1) {
    // 初始化变量
    this._phase = 1;
    this._phaseTimer = 0;

    player.bitmap = ImageManager.loadBitmap('img/SumRndmDde/utb/', 'heart3');
    
    // 杰克动画初始化
    this._animFrameIndex = 0;
    this._animTickCount = 0;
    this._animDelays = [15, 10, 80, 10, 120];
    this._currentDelay = this._animDelays[0];

    // 隐藏原敌人
    var enemy = $gameTroop.members()[0];
    if (enemy) enemy.hide();

    // === 注意：这里的初始化坐标可以不用改了，因为下面有强制锁定 ===
    player.visible = true;
    player.x = CENTER_X; // 这里会读取上面修改过的 CENTER_X
    player.y = CENTER_Y;

    // 创建杰克 Sprite (位置微调)
    this._jackSprite = new Sprite();
    var fullPath = 'img/SumRndmDde/utb/Jack.png';
    this._jackSprite.bitmap = ImageManager.loadNormalBitmap(fullPath, 0);
    this._jackSprite.x = CENTER_X - 100; // 这里我让杰克往左站一点，举例用，你可以自己改
    this._jackSprite.y = BOX_BOTTOM + 90;
    this._jackSprite.anchor.x = 0.5;
    this._jackSprite.anchor.y = 1;
    this._jackSprite.width = 511;
    this._jackSprite.height = 511;
    this.addChild(this._jackSprite);

    this.message("站在旁边看你苦苦挣扎...\n真没意思。");
}

// --- 时间限制: 60秒 ---
if (f >= 3600) {
    if (!this._finalMessageSent) {
        this._finalMessageSent = true;
        this._player.visible = false;
        this._finished = true;
        this.message("好无聊...虽然我也可以陪你\n玩会儿，不过我家的猫还\n等着我回去喂。");
        this.message("快按那个该死的空格键\n放我走。");
        this._awaitingGoodbye = true;
    }
    
    if (this._awaitingGoodbye && Input.isTriggered('ok')) {
        $gameMessage.clear();
        BattleManager.endBattle(0);
    }
}

// --- 阶段管理器 ---
var totalSeconds = Math.floor(f / 60);

// =================================================================
// 阶段 1: 0-20秒 (四个方向快速乱飞) 
// =================================================================
if (totalSeconds < 20) {
    if (this._phase !== 1) {
        this._phase = 1;
        this._phaseTimer = 0;
        this.message("嗯哼，想知道为什么我的\n帽子有伤害吗?");
    }
    
    // 高频率生成
    if (f >= 60 && f % 10 === 0) { 
        
        var bullet = this.createAttack(1);
        
        // 随机从四个方向生成
        var side = Math.floor(Math.random() * 4);
        var speed = 15 + Math.random() * 10; 
        
        switch(side) {
            case 0: // 左边
                bullet.x = this.window.x - 20;
                bullet.y = this.window.y + Math.random() * this.window.height;
                bullet.xspeed = speed;
                bullet.yspeed = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 4;
                break;
            case 1: // 右边
                bullet.x = this.window.x + this.window.width + 20;
                bullet.y = this.window.y + Math.random() * this.window.height;
                bullet.xspeed = -speed;
                bullet.yspeed = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 4;
                break;
            case 2: // 上边
                bullet.x = this.window.x + Math.random() * this.window.width;
                bullet.y = this.window.y - 20;
                bullet.xspeed = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 4;
                bullet.yspeed = speed;
                break;
            case 3: // 下边
                bullet.x = this.window.x + Math.random() * this.window.width;
                bullet.y = this.window.y + this.window.height + 20;
                bullet.xspeed = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 4;
                bullet.yspeed = -speed;
                break;
            default:
                break;
        }
    }
}

// =================================================================
// 阶段 2: 20-40秒 (密集雨点 + 杰克平移)
// =================================================================
else if (totalSeconds < 40) {
    if (this._phase !== 2) {
        this._phase = 2;
        this._phaseTimer = 0;
        this.message("...这笨猫什么时候学会的\n复制粘贴?我可不想变得\n全身都是毛。");
        
        // === 设置杰克的目标位置 (例如：向左移动 100 像素) ===
        this._jackTargetX = this._jackSprite.x - 100; 
    }
    
    // === 让杰克平滑移动到目标位置 ===
    if (this._jackSprite.x > this._jackTargetX) {
        this._jackSprite.x -= 5; // 每帧向左移动 5 像素，数值越大移动越快
        // 如果你想更平滑，可以用插值算法，但简单的 += 5 就够用了
    }

    // 极高频率的雨点 (保持不变)
    if (f % 5 === 0) { 
        var rainCount = 3 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 3); 
        for(var i = 0; i < rainCount; i++) {
            var drop = this.createAttack(2);
            drop.x = this.window.x + Math.random() * this.window.width;
            drop.y = this.window.y - 10;
            drop.yspeed = 5; 
            drop.xspeed = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2;
        }
    }
}

// =================================================================
// 阶段 3: 40-60秒 (玫瑰手杖 - 锁定攻击修正版)
// =================================================================
else {
    if (this._phase !== 3) {
        this._phase = 3;
        this._phaseTimer = 0;
        this.message("玫瑰......很美味的气味，\n不是吗?");
        
        // === 初始化：只执行一次 ===
        this._roses = [];
        this._rosesInitialized = true; // 标记已初始化
        
        // 生成 6 朵玫瑰，放在屏幕四周
        for(var i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
            var rose = this.createAttack(3);
            
            // 随机放在屏幕外
            var side = Math.floor(Math.random() * 4);
            switch(side) {
                case 0: // 左边
                    rose.x = this.window.x - 50; 
                    rose.y = this.window.y + Math.random() * this.window.height;
                    break;
                case 1: // 右边
                    rose.x = this.window.x + this.window.width + 50;
                    rose.y = this.window.y + Math.random() * this.window.height;
                    break;
                case 2: // 上边
                    rose.x = this.window.x + Math.random() * this.window.width;
                    rose.y = this.window.y - 50;
                    break;
                case 3: // 下边
                    rose.x = this.window.x + Math.random() * this.window.width;
                    rose.y = this.window.y + this.window.height + 50;
                    break;
            }
            
            // --- 关键修正：设置初始速度为 0 ---
            // 我们稍后会计算指向玩家的速度
            rose.xspeed = 0;
            rose.yspeed = 0;
            
            this._roses.push(rose);
        }
    }
    
    // --- 核心逻辑：锁定攻击 ---
    // 只有初始化过了才执行
    if (this._rosesInitialized && this._roses && this._roses.length > 0) {
        
        // 遍历每朵玫瑰
        this._roses.forEach(function(rose) {
            
            // --- 关键修正：计算指向玩家的向量 ---
            // 只有当玫瑰还在屏幕里时才计算
            if (rose.parent) { // 确保玫瑰还在场景中
                var dx = player.x - rose.x;
                var dy = player.y - rose.y;
                var distance = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);
                
                // 如果距离太近，停止移动（避免抖动）
                if (distance < 50) {
                    rose.xspeed = 0;
                    rose.yspeed = 0;
                } else {
                    // 计算单位向量，并乘以速度
                    // 速度设为 4
                    var speed = 4;
                    rose.xspeed = (dx / distance) * speed;
                    rose.yspeed = (dy / distance) * speed;
                }
                
                // 旋转效果
                rose.rotation += 0.05;
            }
        });
    }
}
// --- 关键修复：强制玩家位置在中心 ---
// 无论什么模式，都把玩家坐标锁死在中心点
// 这里的 CENTER_X 和 CENTER_Y 已经是上面修改过的值了
player.x = CENTER_X;
player.y = CENTER_Y;

// --- 刷新玩家状态 ---
if (player && player.refresh) {
    player.refresh();
}

// --- 杰克动画更新 ---
if (this._jackSprite && this._jackSprite.bitmap && this._jackSprite.bitmap.isReady()) {
    this._animTickCount++;
    if (this._animTickCount >= this._currentDelay) {
        this._animFrameIndex++;
        if (this._animFrameIndex >= 5) this._animFrameIndex = 0;
        this._animTickCount = 0;
        this._currentDelay = this._animDelays[this._animFrameIndex];
    }
    var sy = this._animFrameIndex * 511;
    this._jackSprite.setFrame(0, sy, 511, 511);
}
</UTB Code>
